posts.content: TTS-Audio-Suite: A ComfyUI custom node integration for local multi-engine multi-language Text-to-Speech and Voice Conversion. Supports: RVC, Echo-TTS, Qwen3-TTS, Cozy Voice 3, Step Audio EditX, IndexTTS-2, Chatterbox (classic and multilingual), F5-TTS, Higgs Audio 2 and VibeVoice with unlimited text length, SRT timing, Character support, and many audio tools

ai.title: TTS-Audio-Suite: ComfyUI multi-engine TTS with RVC, F5-TTS, unlimited length, SRT timing
ai.summary: ComfyUI custom node integrating multiple local TTS engines (RVC, F5-TTS, Echo-TTS, etc.) with voice conversion, unlimited text length handling, SRT subtitle timing, and character support. Provides comprehensive audio processing tools within ComfyUI workflow.
ai.why_important: Enables complete voice production pipeline inside ComfyUI without external dependencies, critical for animation and video workflows.
ai.learnings: Shows how to integrate multiple TTS engines with timing/subtitle synchronization directly in node-based workflows.

posts.content: ComfyUI-Lora-Manager: LoRA Manager for ComfyUI - A powerful extension for organizing, previewing, and integrating LoRA models with metadata and workflow support.

ai.title: ComfyUI-Lora-Manager: LoRA Manager for organizing, previewing LoRA models with metadata
ai.summary: A ComfyUI extension that provides organization, preview, and integration capabilities for LoRA models. Includes metadata support and workflow integration for managing multiple LoRA files.
ai.why_important: Solves the practical problem of managing dozens or hundreds of LoRA models in production ComfyUI workflows.
ai.learnings: Extension demonstrates how to build metadata-driven asset management directly into ComfyUI's node-based interface.

posts.content: openpencil: The world's first open-source AI-native vector design tool and the first to feature concurrent Agent Teams. Design-as-Code. Turn prompts into UI directly on the live canvas. A modern alternative to Pencil.

ai.title: openpencil: Open-source AI-native vector design tool with concurrent Agent Teams, prompts to UI
ai.summary: First open-source AI-native vector design tool featuring concurrent Agent Teams that convert prompts directly into UI on a live canvas. Implements Design-as-Code methodology as a Pencil alternative.
ai.why_important: Represents new paradigm of AI-first design tools where multiple agents collaborate to generate UI from natural language on editable canvas.
ai.learnings: Demonstrates architecture for concurrent AI agents working together in real-time vector design environment with prompt-to-UI conversion.
